skill.name: excel-formula-wizard
skill.description: Creates Excel formulas, VBA macro plans, and pivot table guidance from plain-language spreadsheet requests.
skill.summary: Turn spreadsheet tasks into Excel formulas, VBA guidance, and pivot table plans.
skill.author: Hermes-Sedimentary

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged weak cryptography at SKILL.md:4 and possible obfuscation at SKILL.md:1. Both are false positives: the file contains only metadata and plain usage text, with no code execution, network access, prompt injection, or secret handling evidence.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm
low_findings.description: The static finding at SKILL.md:4 points to the description text, not cryptographic code. No weak algorithm use, hashing logic, or security-sensitive cryptography was found.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Line 4 is frontmatter description text about Excel formulas, VBA macros, and pivot tables. There is no executable code or cryptographic operation.

low_findings.title: False Positive: High File Entropy
low_findings.description: The static entropy finding at SKILL.md:1 does not indicate obfuscation. The reviewed file is readable Markdown with short YAML frontmatter and Chinese text.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The complete file is human-readable Markdown and contains no encoded payloads, binary data, encrypted blocks, or suspicious long strings.

content.user_title: Generate Excel Formulas and VBA Plans
content.value_statement: Spreadsheet users often know the result they need but not the exact Excel method. This skill turns plain requests into formulas, VBA macro guidance, and pivot table plans.
actual_capabilities: Interprets plain-language Excel requests and maps them to formula approaches.
Suggests VBA macro plans for repetitive spreadsheet tasks.
Explains pivot table structures for summaries and reports.
Helps choose functions for lookup, filtering, counting, and aggregation tasks.
Provides review reminders for important spreadsheet outputs.
limitations: Does not directly open, edit, or validate workbook files by itself.
Generated formulas and macros require human review before production use.
Complex workbook logic may need sample columns, sheet names, and edge cases.
It does not replace financial, legal, or compliance review.

use_cases.title: Build Reporting Formulas
use_cases.description: Convert a reporting need into Excel formulas for totals, counts, lookups, and conditional calculations.

use_cases.title: Plan Repetitive Macros
use_cases.description: Describe a repeated cleanup workflow and receive a clear VBA macro plan for review.

use_cases.title: Design Pivot Summaries
use_cases.description: Turn raw transaction data into a pivot table layout with rows, columns, values, and filters.

prompt_templates.title: Create a Basic Formula
prompt_templates.prompt: I need an Excel formula for this task: [describe task]. My columns are [list columns]. Please explain the result.

prompt_templates.title: Fix a Formula
prompt_templates.prompt: This Excel formula is not giving the expected result: [paste formula]. My expected result is [result]. Please diagnose it.

prompt_templates.title: Plan a Pivot Table
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a pivot table for this dataset: [describe columns]. I need to answer [business question].

prompt_templates.title: Design a VBA Workflow
prompt_templates.prompt: Plan a VBA macro for this workflow: [steps]. Include assumptions, safety checks, and what I should review before running it.

output_examples.input: I need to total sales for one region and one product category.
output_examples.output: The skill would recommend a conditional total approach, identify the region and category columns, and explain how to verify the result.

output_examples.input: I need a pivot table showing monthly revenue by salesperson.
output_examples.output: The skill would suggest month in rows, salesperson in columns, revenue in values, and optional filters for region or product.

output_examples.input: I repeat the same cleanup steps every week.
output_examples.output: The skill would outline a VBA macro plan, list workbook assumptions, and add review checkpoints before running the automation.

best_practices: Provide column names, sample values, and the expected result.
Ask for explanations when a formula will be maintained by other users.
Test generated formulas and macros on a copy of the workbook.
anti_patterns: Do not run generated macros on important files without review.
Do not omit sheet names, column names, or edge cases from complex requests.
Do not use generated outputs as final compliance or financial approval.

faq.question: Can this skill create Excel formulas from plain English?
faq.answer: Yes. It is designed to translate spreadsheet tasks into formula approaches and explanations.

faq.question: Does it write VBA macros?
faq.answer: It can provide VBA macro plans and guidance. You should review and test all macro output before use.

faq.question: Can it build pivot tables for me?
faq.answer: It can design pivot table layouts and explain fields, values, filters, and grouping choices.

faq.question: Does it access my workbook automatically?
faq.answer: No. The skill file only provides guidance. You must share the relevant workbook details in the conversation.

faq.question: Which tools does it support?
faq.answer: The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.

faq.question: Is it safe for sensitive spreadsheet data?
faq.answer: Avoid sharing secrets or regulated data unless your AI environment is approved for that data.
